title: CapTrap-Seq: A quantitative method for complete and faithful RNA transcript sequencing
author: Carbonell-Sala, Silvia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This document contains an adapted Catalan translation of the abstract of Carbonell-Sala et al. ‘CapTrap-Seq: A platform-agnostic and quantitative approach for high-fidelity full-length RNA sequencing”, Nature Communications (2024), https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49523-3 , and an extended non-specialist summary also in Catalan
